items.check: Verify M-001 acceptance criteria: hourly/daily aggregate totals match source tolerance and every stored event has provider + project_id (or unknown) with attribution confidence and reason code.

Verify M-002 acceptance criteria: metrics payload exposes provider/project splits for supported time buckets, returns estimated and billed cost layers with labels, and freshness state changes when source watermark ages past threshold.

Verify M-003 acceptance criteria: memory insights return project churn/growth trends, response/persistence omit raw memory content, and unavailable files are surfaced via explicit freshness/error metadata.

Verify M-004 acceptance criteria: users can create/update/clone views without mutating certified widgets, resolver enforces parameter validation plus role constraints, and shared view payload remains stable across restart snapshot reload.

Verify M-005 acceptance criteria: workspace state supports add/move/resize/hide/preset actions, widget shell derives freshness age and attribution confidence metadata, and team share export redacts local sensitive identifiers unless allowlisted.
Validate intent-marker compliance across modified implementation files: any :MARKER: annotations must follow ':MARKER: [what]; [why]' with non-empty rationale.
Validate structural quality baseline: no GOD_FUNCTION violations in modified implementation code (function length > 50 lines or nesting depth > 3).
items.finding: Refactor complete: normalize_usage_event, resolve_project_attribution, and provider parse_* functions were split into smaller helpers; function-size threshold now satisfied.

items.check: Validate cross-cutting error-handling consistency across ingestion and API routes: malformed/invalid inputs produce structured, auditable handling rather than silent drops or inconsistent schema.
